reviews.review_description:
I was once apart of the team but a kid named yippe accused me of scamming him 

I had did something else with someone and did they get scammed no 

Btw don't download this game it's kinda bad and the mod team and stuff is horrible..

THE OWNER IS "COLEORSMTH" HE SUCKS

developer_response.body: tell me your side of the story in dms

reviews.review_description:
this is a great game

good moderation

cool owners

good maps

many gamemodes

good community
This game is a very fun game and has some cool features that are in it and the things in this fan game are very different from others and they are very cool and you should play it 👍

This game has a lot of potential and I really like the ideas that were incorporated within the game also I can see that this game will become one of the best gorilla tag competition out there 
-FROSTYVR

developer_response.body: Thanks dude! Hope you have fun playing the game!

reviews.review_description: Idk y we even need to talk to the admin in game like bruh let us enjoy the game for once and stop banning people so u can blame the admin in game for this reveiw

developer_response.body: Alright listen, I cant control what the admins do. If you're having trouble, contact me in the discord.

reviews.review_description: Fun and a good game overall
